headlines.headline: Joval Brands names new head of cloud infrastructure division

sentiment.reasoning: The appointment of a new division head is a standard leadership change that typically has minimal immediate market impact.

headlines.headline: Arnik Commerce announces breakthrough in data analytics

headlines.headline: Xelvol Biotech reports 3% decline in operating income

headlines.headline: Jorval Trading Co misses quarterly revenue estimates by 12%

headlines.headline: Arnik Commerce sees 10% drop in new customer orders this quarter

sentiment.reasoning: A 10% drop in new customer orders is a clear indicator of weakening demand that will likely impact future revenue growth.

headlines.headline: Joval Brands announces $7.9B share buyback program

sentiment.reasoning: A large share buyback program is a direct signal of management confidence and provides immediate support for the stock price.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
